title: dacryodes oblongipetala
intro: Dacryodes oblongipetala is a species of tree in the family Burseraceae, commonly known as the yellow myrtle or yellow satinwood. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dacryodes oblongipetala include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often made by combining it with other medicinal plants or herbs.
